compiled_state.title: 30c0-6d16: Task A — Write RED structural tests for INTENT_CONFLICT handling in fix-bug Gate 1a
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Story
30c0-6d16 — fix-bug Gate 1a pauses investigation when intent-search detects conflicting caller usage

## testing_mode
RED

## TDD Test Approach
Create tests/scripts/test-fix-bug-intent-conflict-handling.sh with 5 structural assertion sections. Greps plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md for required INTENT_CONFLICT handling content.

Given: fix-bug SKILL.md Step 1.5 has only 3 terminal outcomes; INTENT_CONFLICT outcome not yet present
When: tests/scripts/test-fix-bug-intent-conflict-handling.sh is executed
Then: all 5 test sections fail (RED) because INTENT_CONFLICT handling has not been added yet

## File to Create
tests/scripts/test-fix-bug-intent-conflict-handling.sh (executable)

## Test Sections (5 required)

1. **test_intent_conflict_outcome_exists** — grep fix-bug/SKILL.md for 'intent-conflict' outcome in Step 1.5; assert it is documented as a terminal outcome
2. **test_three_resolution_options** — grep for '3 options' or the three specific options ('confirm ticket correct', 'confirm current behavior correct', 'revise ticket description') near 'INTENT_CONFLICT'; assert all 3 options are documented
3. **test_gate_1a_result_intent_conflict** — grep for 'GATE_1A_RESULT.*intent-conflict' or 'intent-conflict' assignment to GATE_1A_RESULT; assert the variable is set to intent-conflict
4. **test_step_1_7_skips_intent_conflict** — grep Step 1.7 in SKILL.md for 'intent-conflict' in the skip condition; assert Gate 1b conditional handles the 4th case
5. **test_non_interactive_deferred** — grep for 'INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED' near 'intent-conflict' in SKILL.md; assert non-interactive mode defers the dialog

## .test-index Entry (add as new entry)
plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md: tests/scripts/test-fix-bug-intent-conflict-handling.sh [test_intent_conflict_outcome_exists]

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tests/scripts/test-fix-bug-intent-conflict-handling.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/scripts/test-fix-bug-intent-conflict-handling.sh
- [ ] Test file contains all 5 test sections
  Verify: grep -c 'test_intent_conflict_outcome_exists\|test_three_resolution_options\|test_gate_1a_result_intent_conflict\|test_step_1_7_skips_intent_conflict\|test_non_interactive_deferred' tests/scripts/test-fix-bug-intent-conflict-handling.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 5)}'
- [ ] Running the test suite produces failures (RED state confirmed)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-fix-bug-intent-conflict-handling.sh; [ $? -ne 0 ]
- [ ] .test-index entry added with RED marker
  Verify: grep 'plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md.*test-fix-bug-intent-conflict-handling.sh.*\[test_intent_conflict_outcome_exists\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci passes
  Verify: plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci
